input: Add a PantryIllustration showing shelves of preserved jars, root vegetables, and hanging dried herbs
failures: COMPLETE_SCENE: The output is truncated mid-comment ('/* Middle shelf jars') — the component is never closed, the middle and bottom shelves are never populated with content, and the hanging dried herbs (a key requested element) are never rendered. The scene is incomplete.

input: Update FarmIllustration to add a water trough near the fence line
failures: COMPLETE_SCENE: The SVG output is truncated mid-element (the last line element is cut off with 'x1="305' incomplete), meaning the component does not render a complete scene. The trough and scene are unfinished — the closing tags for the trough group, SVG, and JSX return are all missing.

input: Create a GreenhouseIllustration — glass panes, seed trays, misting can, tomato plants
failures: depicts_subject: The output is incomplete/truncated — it cuts off mid-scene with only glass panes and the beginning of a shelf structure. Seed trays, misting can, and tomato plants (three of the four requested elements) are never rendered. The greenhouse is not identifiable as a greenhouse from the shapes alone without the defining interior elements.

complete_scene: The code is truncated mid-element (the center shelf rect is commented out and the function body is cut off with no closing tags). The scene is not complete — no ground/floor plane, no tomato plants, no seed trays, no misting can, and the SVG/function are never closed.

input: Create a NightSkyIllustration for a sleep/evening mode — full moon, Milky Way arc, silhouetted hills
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses radialGradient for the sky background and ellipse strokes for the Milky Way rather than flat solid-colored shapes stacked at distinct depth planes. The paper cut-out aesthetic requires filled flat shapes (polygons, paths) layered at sky/mid/foreground planes — not gradients or stroke-based effects. The silhouetted hills are referenced in the plan but the code is truncated before they are rendered.

COMPLETE_SCENE: The code is truncated mid-element — the stars group is incomplete, and critically the silhouetted hills (Layer 4) are never drawn. The foreground terrain is entirely absent, leaving the bottom portion of the viewBox as an empty void with no ground plane.

input: Add a new MealsIllustration for the Provisions page — a cozy kitchen scene with a cast iron pot, wooden cutting board, and fresh herbs
failures: depicts_subject: The SVG code is truncated mid-render — the cast iron pot is never completed (ends with an open <ellipse cx=" tag), so the primary subject (pot) is not fully drawn and identifiable.

paper_cutout_style: The illustration uses linearGradients and drop shadow filters rather than the paper cut-out aesthetic of flat colored shapes stacked at distinct depth planes. Gradients on the pot and board violate the flat paper-cutout requirement.

complete_scene: The code is incomplete/truncated — the cast iron pot, herbs, and accent shadows are never rendered. The scene is missing major described elements and the SVG is syntactically broken, meaning it would not render a complete scene.
